author: gb9t
content: Iter 108 result: net/core/skbuff-misc.md (sk_buff helpers - skbuff.c helpers ~3000 lines: skb_clone shallow shared-frag + skb_copy deep + pskb_expand_head grow headroom/tailroom + skb_push/pull pointer moves + skb_trim shrink + ___pskb_trim non-linear-aware + __pskb_pull_tail copy-frag-to-linear + skb_copy_bits gather scatter + skb_split linear-split-at-offset + skb_segment GSO MSS-based fragmentation + skb_unshare/skb_share_check writeable copy-on-write + skb_seq_read iterate frags + dataref shared-frag refcount) + virt/kvm/x86-pic.md (KVM in-kernel 8259 PIC emulation - i8259.c ~655 lines; per-VM dual cascaded master+slave PIC at I/O 0x20-0x21 + 0xA0-0xA1 + ELCR at 0x4D0/0x4D1 + KvmKpicState IRR/IMR/ISR/ICW1-4/OCW1-3 state machine + cascade slave through master IRQ2 + edge vs level via ELCR + AEOI + kvm_pic_set_irq + kvm_pic_read_irq INTA-cycle + pic_update_irq → BSP lapic + KVM_GET/SET_IRQCHIP migration + KVM_CAP_SPLIT_IRQCHIP toggle). 166 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/core/flow_dissector.md (per-pkt 5-tuple extract) + virt/kvm/x86-pit.md (8254 PIT).
